title: Optimal Transport Q-Learning for Flow Policy Steering and Acceleration
summary_zh: OTQL 用 advantage-weighted conditional optimal transport flow matching 对次优 flow policy 做 RL 后训练：解 entropic OT 得到 noise-action 最优耦合，既把策略推向高价值动作又拉直积分路径。仅 50–60 个 episode 就把单任务成功率从 36% 提到 86%、预训练 VLA 从 38% 提到 76%，并把推理步数削减 70%。
